weather: Today in Edmonds: Cloudy morning giving way to mostly sunny skies, high 62°F. Light south winds 8-9 mph. 20% chance of light rain during the day. Evening turns increasingly cloudy with rain likely after midnight, low 49°F. Southeast winds picking up to 15-25 mph overnight. Rainfall totals 0.1-0.25" possible. Pleasant day overall before wet evening.

openings.summary: Pool posting for multiple high-school History vacancies for the 2026-2027 school year. District may fill positions directly from this pool or post specific openings later.
General pool posting for anticipated secondary Social Studies/History openings. Principals review the pool and contact selected applicants for interviews as vacancies arise.
District is actively reviewing applications and conducting interviews for secondary Social Studies/History positions for 2026-2027.
General pool for secondary teachers including English and History. Fully completed applications with two confidential references are screened for anticipated 2026-2027 openings.
District uses general “pool” postings to streamline hiring for high-school English positions. Principals access the pool as vacancies occur for 2026-2027.
Ongoing pool for high-school English teachers. Applicants are encouraged to apply early; references are contacted automatically upon submission.

openings.role: High School English & Social Studies Teacher Recruitment
openings.summary: District-wide recruitment for English and Social Studies teachers for 2026-2027. Hard-to-fill positions may qualify for a $500 signing bonus.

career.notes: Most districts post general “pool” openings rather than specific vacancies this early in the hiring cycle. Applicants should create profiles in each district’s applicant-tracking system (AppliTrack or FastTrack/TEDk12) and monitor postings weekly, as individual school openings appear from late spring through summer. Only Snohomish provided a firm deadline and salary range; other districts will release specifics when individual positions are posted.
